Sri Veera Nagendra Swamy
& Valli Devasena
Subrahmanya Swamy Temple

A Sacred Abode in the Heart of Vijayawada

⚠ Important: This temple is situated near a high-security zone. All visitors must carry a valid government-issued photo ID for entry.

About the Temple

✦

Sri Veera Nagendra Swamy & Valli Devasena Subrahmanya Swamy Temple is a beloved spiritual centre located in Buckinghampeta, Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh. The temple enshrines Lord Subrahmanya Swamy along with Goddess Valli and Devasena, drawing thousands of devoted devotees throughout the year.

The presiding deity, adorned with magnificent floral garlands of roses, jasmine, and marigold, is beautifully decorated and surrounded by sacred turmeric mounds. The golden Prabhavali arch and the sacred Shivalinga reflect the rich Dravidian temple traditions of Andhra Pradesh.

Temple Chairman
Sri S. Prasad

Visitor Guidelines

🛡
High-Security Zone
This temple is located near a restricted high-security zone. Valid government-issued photo ID is mandatory for all visitors. Entry is subject to security checks by authorities.
📵
Photography
No photos or videos inside the sanctum. No coconut breaking inside the temple premises.
🧎
Dress Code
Traditional attire is respectfully requested. Footwear must be removed before entry.
